You're Doing Great, Coach.

Nobody tells volunteer coaches they're doing a good job. We're here to change that. Free tools for practice plans, walkup music, and game day — built by coaches, for coaches.

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

Practice Plans

Generate a complete, age-appropriate practice plan in 30 seconds. 16 sports. 5,798 drills. Free.

Walkup songs and announcer introductions for every player. Make every kid feel like a pro.

Game Day

Fair lineups, batting orders, and position rotations. Every kid plays. Coming soon.

Coming soon
Why We Built This

For the coach who never had one

Coaching isn't about wins and losses — it's about showing up for kids who need someone in their corner. But volunteering to coach doesn't come with a manual. There's no mentor in the dugout. No one tells you if you're doing it right.

CoachPilot is your sideline. Practice plans that work, tools that save time, and the confidence that comes from knowing you showed up prepared. Because every coach deserves to hear: you're doing a good job.

5,798
drills across 16 sports
4
coaching tools, one platform
Free
to get started

Join coaches who are building this together

We're building CoachPilot with real coaches. Get updates, new tools, and coaching tips.

No spam. Just coaching.

You're on the team.

We'll keep you posted on new tools and coaching tips.
